creation_query.query:
-- Version Control -- (2024-09-09) - (Erald) adding clean_data.clean_version AS agent_name, in the order_date CTE for getting MS name clean version -- (2024-09-24) - V1.0: (Hasna) adding EZA data -- (2024-10-01) - V1.1: (Hasna) adding Tiktok Shop data -- (2024-10-04) - V1.2: (Hasna) Exclude tiktok shop data price 0 (sample for marketing), adding tfcode "STF" as order form MSE (big merchant) -- (2024-10-07) - V1.3: (Erald) Added mse_flag by adding mse_name_from_ms_static CTE -- (2024-10-23) - V1.4: (Hasna) Added Rental to Purcahase data -- (2025-01-13) - V1.5 : (Hasna) Added rejected and big merchant data -- (2025-01-22) - V1.6 : (Erald) added new SKU in nama_produk and edc_type column for 'EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE_INSURANCE' and 'EDC_MOREFUN_INSURANCE' -- (2025-01-24) - V1.7 : (Erald) changed "gsheet_ssot_documentation" to "gdocs_ssot_documentation", removed the GSheet and put the document -- (2025-02-21)- v1.8: (Hasna) Add column related to OTS -- (2025-06-26) - v1.9 : (Amalia) Change logic to define OTS in edc new ops flow -- (2025-07-28) - v1.10 : (Amalia) change subquery ots from visit_ssot_opentable to visit_ssot -- (2025-08-12) - v1.11 : (Amalia) fix payment metadata date type -- (2025-10-14) - v1.12 : (Amalia) change field name based on edc_order_delivery -- (2026-01-05) - v1.13 : (Amalia) added order platform (old data, apps, website) # DOCUMENTATION # https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BhibNbDor68toaQN5KE73KHxUGwuRknlxeIr-qhkpOc/edit?gid=1652564871#gid=1652564871 # https://docs.google.com/document/d/1mjYH4iYlHoAP6AjQWXD_dANndxzSO3rsrfb7c9SY_4o/edit?usp=sharing CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.edc_purchase_data` -- ( -- -- Order / event times -- order_date DATE OPTIONS(description="Timestamp when user created the payment link"), -- payment_date DATE OPTIONS(description="Date when user paid the order"), -- -- Order identifiers -- order_id STRING OPTIONS(description="Original order ID (kept as STRING to preserve any non-numeric/long IDs)"), -- no_order_2 STRING OPTIONS(description="Invoice number (STRING)"), -- children_orderid STRING OPTIONS(description="Unique child order id (primary key). If an original order has multiple machines, each child has its own id)"), -- bw_user_id STRING OPTIONS(description="User ID or phone number used by merchants"), -- -- Product / price / quantity -- nama_produk STRING OPTIONS(description="Product name on cart at checkout"), -- product_name_standardize STRING OPTIONS(description="Standardized product/brand name"), -- edc_type STRING OPTIONS(description="EDC type (e.g., EDC Android, EDC Saku, Bundle, Refurbished)"), -- total_barang INT64 OPTIONS(description="Total quantity of machines in the order"), -- harga_produk STRING OPTIONS(description="Price of EDC machine in smallest currency unit (IDR) as integer"), -- -- -- Order status & workflow -- order_status STRING OPTIONS(description="Status of order:- Waiting for doc: users need complete the document like KYC/KYB/Bank account- Waiting for ops: users already complete the document, waiting for ops team to assign serial number and tid- Completed: users already assign to serial number and tid, machine will be dispatch - Rejected: users cannot complete the documents within 15 days after paid date"), -- final_action STRING OPTIONS(description="Final action/decision for the order (e.g., COMPLETED, REJECTED)"), -- final_action_date STRING OPTIONS(description="Timestamp when final action was applied"), -- reject_reason STRING OPTIONS(description="Rejection reason if order_status = 'Rejected'"), -- -- -- Channel / agent / source -- channel STRING OPTIONS(description="Channel where users paid (e.g., MSE, Other Channels, MSE-Big Agent)"), -- subchannel STRING OPTIONS(description="Subchannel when user paid (e.g., Organic, Ambassador, MRO)"), -- tfcode STRING OPTIONS(description="TF code entered at checkout"), -- agent_name STRING OPTIONS(description="Agent name based on tfcode"), -- flag_sheet STRING OPTIONS(description="Source of data (e.g., EDC Order Data, Verifikasi Order, EDC New Ops)"), -- mvt_checking STRING OPTIONS(description="status of MVT team checking, this is only from old source"), -- -- -- Verification / flags (normalized to BOOL) -- kyc_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="Whether the users done kyc or not. if 1= yes, 0= no"), -- kyb_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="Whether the users done kyb or not. if 1= yes, 0= no"), -- bank_account_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="Whether the users done add bank account information or not. if 1= yes, 0= no"), -- mse_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="Flag indicating MSE association (TRUE/FALSE)"), -- ots_flag STRING OPTIONS(description="OTS-related flag (TRUE/FALSE)"), -- -- -- Status timestamps (standardized to TIMESTAMP) -- waiting_for_additional_doc_at STRING OPTIONS(description="Timestamp when status changed to waiting for additional documents"), -- waiting_for_ops_at STRING OPTIONS(description="Timestamp when status changed to waiting for ops"), -- completed_at STRING OPTIONS(description="Timestamp when status changed to completed"), -- -- -- Payment & bank details -- payment_status STRING OPTIONS(description="Payment status for the order (PAID, REFUNDED)"), -- bank_account_name STRING OPTIONS(description="Bank account name provided by user for their BW account"), -- bank_name STRING OPTIONS(description="Bank name"), -- bank_account_number STRING OPTIONS(description="Bank account number"), -- -- -- Documentation reference -- gdocs_ssot_documentation STRING OPTIONS(description="Reference/link to Google Docs SSOT documentation") -- ) -- OPTIONS( -- description="EDC Purchase Data since Aug 2023: order details, channel, product type, verification flags, payment status, and process timestamps. Primary key = children_orderid.", -- labels=[("domain","retail"),("owner","data_team"),("table","edc_purchase_data")] -- ) ( -- Order / event times order_date DATE OPTIONS(description="The date the order or transaction was first initiated or recorded in the source system. This field's logic varies by the 'flag_sheet' source; for example, in 'EDC New Ops Flow' it represents the 'paymentlinkgeneratedtime'."), payment_date DATE OPTIONS(description="The date the customer's payment for the order was successfully completed. This is a key event timestamp used for tracking sales revenue and initiating the operational fulfillment process (KYC, KYB, shipping)."), -- Order identifiers order_id STRING OPTIONS(description="The parent order identifier from the source system (e.g., Blibli 'no_order', new ops 'order_id', TikTok 'parent_order_id'). This ID groups all items purchased in a single transaction. For a unique key per machine, use 'children_orderid'."), no_order_2 STRING OPTIONS(description="A secondary identifier related to the order, often representing the invoice number (e.g., 'INV-PL-20250120154406483') or a source-specific transaction ID (e.g., '577317556875921084'). Its content and purpose vary depending on the 'flag_sheet' (data source)."), children_orderid STRING OPTIONS(description="The **unique primary key** for this table, representing a single purchased machine. If a parent 'order_id' included multiple machines, this field is synthetically generated (e.g., 'ORDERID001', 'ORDERID002') to ensure one row per machine."), bw_user_id STRING OPTIONS(description="The unique BukuWarung User ID of the purchasing merchant, typically their registered phone number (e.g., '85270333427'). This ID links the transaction to the merchant's account."), -- Product / price / quantity nama_produk STRING OPTIONS(description="The raw, original product name as it appeared in the source system (e.g., checkout cart, TikTok listing). This field is often unstandardized and descriptive (e.g., 'Mesin EDC Saku BukuAgen...'). For a cleaned version, use 'product_name_standardize'."), product_name_standardize STRING OPTIONS(description="A cleaned, standardized category for the product brand or model. This field is derived using mapping logic (e.g., 'CASE' statements on 'nama_produk' or plan names) to group various raw product names into consistent categories. Examples: 'Pax', 'MoreFun', 'Verifone', 'MoreFun - Bundle'."), edc_type STRING OPTIONS(description="A standardized business category for the EDC hardware type. It is derived from the product or plan name and classifies items into groups like 'Saku' (pocket-sized), 'Android - New', 'Android - Refurbished', or bundles like 'Saku - Insurance Bundle'."), total_barang INT64 OPTIONS(description="The quantity of machines represented by this specific row. As this table is normalized to the individual machine level (by 'children_orderid'), this value is **always 1**."), harga_produk STRING OPTIONS(description="The price of the single EDC machine (per-unit price) for this row, stored as a STRING (e.g., '649000', '1999000'). In cases of multi-quantity orders, this value is calculated by dividing the total amount by the number of units. Represents IDR amount."), -- Order status & workflow order_status STRING OPTIONS(description="The standardized operational status of the order. This field tracks the order's progression through the fulfillment funnel.
• **Waiting_for_additional_doc**: User needs to complete documentation (KYC, KYB, bank account).
• **Waiting_for_ops**: User documents are complete; awaiting Ops team to assign serial number/TID.
• **Completed**: Machine is assigned and ready for dispatch.
• **Rejected**: User failed to complete documents within the required timeframe.
• **Cancelled**: Order was cancelled."), final_action STRING OPTIONS(description="The final, settled status of the order. This is often the same as 'order_status' but represents the definitive outcome (e.g., 'Completed', 'Rejected', 'Cancelled')."), final_action_date STRING OPTIONS(description="The date (stored as a STRING) on which the 'final_action' (e.g., 'Completed', 'Rejected') was recorded for the order. This marks the end of the order's operational workflow."), reject_reason STRING OPTIONS(description="A free-text or semi-structured reason explaining why an order was put on hold ('Waiting_for_additional_doc') or set to 'Rejected'. Examples: 'User is not registered,Bank Account Not Submitted', 'NON_KYC,Bank Account Not Submitted'."), -- Channel / agent / source channel STRING OPTIONS(description="The high-level acquisition channel through which the order was placed. This is derived from source data or 'tfcode' logic.
• **MSE**: Merchant Success Executive (sales-assisted).
• **MSE-Big Agent**: A specific tier of sales agent.
• **Other Channels**: Non-sales-assisted channels (e.g., organic, TikTok)."), subchannel STRING OPTIONS(description="A more granular acquisition sub-channel providing a detailed breakdown of the 'channel' field. Examples: 'MS Channel' (for MSE), 'Organic', 'Live Streaming', 'TikTok Shop', 'Influencer', 'MRO'."), tfcode STRING OPTIONS(description="The raw tracking or referral code (e.g., agent code, campaign code) entered by the user during checkout (e.g., 'TFORGANIC', 'TIKTOKBW', 'TF04286'). This code is used to derive the 'channel', 'subchannel', and 'agent_name'."), agent_name STRING OPTIONS(description="The standardized name of the sales agent, influencer, or acquisition entity associated with the order (e.g., 'MROWINDA', 'agus', 'TFORGANIC'). This is derived by mapping the 'tfcode' or cleaning the raw agent name from the source system."), flag_sheet STRING OPTIONS(description="Indicates the original data source from which this row was loaded. This is critical for understanding which business process generated the record. Examples: 'EDC New Ops Flow' (modern system), 'Verifikasi Order' (old form), 'Tiktokshop Order Data', 'Master Sheet Rental'."), mvt_checking STRING OPTIONS(description="A legacy status field from older data sources ('Verifikasi Order', 'Tiktokshop Order Data') indicating the Merchant Verification Team's (MVT) check status (e.g., 'Verified', 'On hold'). This field is blank for modern sources like 'EDC New Ops Flow'."), -- Verification / flags kyc_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="A flag (**1** = Yes, **0** = No) indicating if the merchant has successfully completed the 'Know Your Customer' (KYC) verification step. This is a critical step in the operational funnel."), kyb_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="A flag (**1** = Yes, **0** = No) indicating if the merchant has successfully completed the 'Know Your Business' (KYB) verification step. This is a critical step in the operational funnel."), bank_account_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="A flag (**1** = Yes, **0** = No) indicating if the merchant has successfully added their bank account information. This is a critical step in the operational funnel."), mse_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="A flag (**1** = Yes, **NULL/0** = No) indicating if the 'agent_name' for the order is recognized as an official Merchant Success Executive (MSE) based on an internal mapping table."), ots_flag STRING OPTIONS(description="A flag indicating if the order was an 'OTS' (On-The-Spot) activation, derived from a join with the 'ms_visit_ssot' table. Values are **'OTS'** or **'Non OTS'**."), -- Status timestamps waiting_for_additional_doc_at STRING OPTIONS(description="The date (stored as STRING) when the order status first changed to 'Waiting_for_additional_doc'. This marks the start of the period where the user needs to provide more information. Populated for 'EDC New Ops Flow' source."), waiting_for_ops_at STRING OPTIONS(description="The date (stored as STRING) when the order status first changed to 'Waiting_for_ops'. This marks the start of the operational team's fulfillment work (e.g., device assignment). Populated for 'EDC New Ops Flow' source."), completed_at STRING OPTIONS(description="The date (stored as STRING) when the order status first changed to 'Completed'. This is equivalent to the 'final_action_date' for completed orders. Populated for 'EDC New Ops Flow' source."), -- Payment & bank details payment_status STRING OPTIONS(description="The financial status of the transaction.
• **PAID**: Payment was successful.
• **REFUNDED**: The payment was successfully refunded to the customer.
• **REFUNDING_FAILED**: An attempt to refund the payment failed."), bank_account_name STRING OPTIONS(description="The beneficiary name (in UPPERCASE) associated with the merchant's bank account, as provided during the verification process (e.g., 'SRI WAHYUNI'). This field is populated primarily from the 'EDC New Ops Flow' source."), bank_name STRING OPTIONS(description="The name of the merchant's bank (in UPPERCASE), as provided during the verification process. Examples: 'BRI', 'BCA', 'MANDIRI'. This field is populated primarily from the 'EDC New Ops Flow' source."), bank_account_number STRING OPTIONS(description="The merchant's bank account number, as provided during the verification process. This field is populated primarily from the 'EDC New Ops Flow' source."), order_platform STRING OPTIONS(description= "Order Platform source, start 24th Dec merchants no longer need to download the BukuAgen app to purchase BukuAgen EDC. Examples: 'Old ', 'old forms', 'TikTok Shop', 'EZA', 'Rental'"), -- Documentation reference gdocs_ssot_documentation STRING OPTIONS(description="A static URL linking to the official Google Docs Single Source of Truth (SSOT) documentation that defines the logic and business rules for this table.") ) OPTIONS( description="SSOT for all EDC machine purchase transactions since Aug 2023. Consolidates multiple sources (New Ops, old forms, TikTok, EZA, Rental) into one unified view. Keyed by 'children_orderid' (one row per machine). Tracks sales/fulfillment funnel, channel performance, and verification milestones (KYC/KYB).", labels=[("domain","retail"),("owner","data_team"),("table","edc_purchase_data")] ) AS ### EDC ORDER DATA FORM WITH order_data AS( SELECT DISTINCT DATE(tanggal_order) AS input_time_data, no_order, no_order as no_order_2, user_id_manual AS bw_user_id, DATE(tanggal_order) AS tanggal_order, nama_produk, CAST(total_barang AS INT) AS total_barang, harga_produk, CASE WHEN order_status = "Accept Order" THEN "Completed" END AS order_status, CASE WHEN final_action = "Accept Order" THEN "Completed" END AS final_action, final_action_date, reject_reason, CASE WHEN channel = "MSE" THEN "MSE" WHEN channel != "MSE" THEN "Other Channels" END AS channel, mvt_checking, -- TRIM(LOWER(agent_name)) AS agent_name, clean_data.clean_version AS agent_name, "" AS tfcode, CASE WHEN nama_produk LIKE "EDC A920 Pro%" THEN "Pax" WHEN nama_produk LIKE "%VeriFone%" THEN "Verifone" ELSE nama_produk END AS product_name_standardize, CASE WHEN nama_produk LIKE "EDC A920 Pro%" THEN "Android - New" WHEN nama_produk LIKE "%VeriFone%" THEN "Android - New" END AS edc_type, "EDC Order Data" AS flag_sheet, 1 AS kyc_flag, 1 AS kyb_flag, 1 AS bank_account_flag, "" AS waiting_for_additional_doc_at, "" AS waiting_for_ops_at, "" AS completed_at, CASE WHEN channel = "MSE"THEN 'MS Channel' WHEN channel != "MSE" THEN "Others" END AS SubChannel, "PAID" AS payment_status, "Non OTS" AS ots_flag, CAST(no_order AS STRING) AS children_orderid, "" bank_account_name, "" bank_name, "" bank_account_number, "Old Manual Data" order_platform FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.edc_order_blibli_data_v2_static` AS blibli_data_v2 LEFT JOIN `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnts_derived.ms_name_cleaning_version` clean_data ON TRIM(LOWER(blibli_data_v2.agent_name)) = clean_data.agent_name --WHERE user_id_manual IS NOT NULL WHERE final_action IN ("Accept Order","On Progress Cheking") AND note = "New Order" ) ### VERIFICATION FORM , verification_data AS( SELECT DISTINCT DATE(FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S', timestamp))) AS input_time_data, CASE WHEN order_id IS NULL THEN invoice_number_doku ELSE order_id END AS no_order, CASE WHEN order_id IS NULL THEN invoice_number_doku ELSE order_id END AS no_order_2, uid_pembeli_bukuwarung AS bw_user_id, DATE(paid_date) AS tanggal_order, product_selected AS nama_produk, 1 AS total_barang, --this will cover by unique id/ children order id CAST(total_pcs_confirmed AS INT) AS unique_id, CAST(CAST(amount_doku AS INT)/ CAST(total_pcs_confirmed AS INT) AS STRING) AS harga_produk, CASE WHEN final_order_status = "Accept Order" THEN "Completed" WHEN final_order_status = "On Hold Order" THEN "Waiting_for_additional_doc" END AS order_status, CASE WHEN action_1 = "Accept Order" THEN "Completed" WHEN action_1 = "On Hold Order" THEN "Waiting_for_additional_doc" END AS final_action, action_1_date as final_action_date, reject_or_on_hold_reason AS reject_reason, CASE WHEN acquisition_channel = "MSE" THEN "MSE" ELSE "Other Channels" END AS channel, mvt_verification_status AS mvt_checking, -- mse_name AS agent_name, TRIM(LOWER(clean_data.clean_version)) AS agent_name, "" as tfcode, CASE WHEN product_selected LIKE "%EDC PAX A920%" THEN "Pax" WHEN product_selected LIKE "%VeriFone%" THEN "Verifone" WHEN product_selected LIKE "%EDC Saku%" THEN "Tianyu" END AS product_name_standardize, CASE WHEN product_selected LIKE "%EDC PAX A920%" THEN "Android - New" WHEN product_selected LIKE "%VeriFone%" THEN "Android - New" WHEN product_selected LIKE "%EDC Saku%" THEN "Saku" END AS edc_type, "Verifikasi Order" AS flag_sheet, CASE WHEN action_1 = "Accept Order" THEN 1 WHEN action_1 = "On Hold Order" AND LOWER(reject_or_on_hold_reason) NOT LIKE "%kyc%" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS kyc_flag, CASE WHEN action_1 = "Accept Order" THEN 1 WHEN action_1 = "On Hold Order" AND LOWER(reject_or_on_hold_reason) NOT LIKE "%kyb%" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS kyb_flag, CASE WHEN action_1 = "Accept Order" THEN 1 WHEN action_1 = "On Hold Order" AND LOWER(reject_or_on_hold_reason) NOT LIKE "%bank account%" AND LOWER(reject_or_on_hold_reason) NOT LIKE "%form not%" AND LOWER(reject_or_on_hold_reason) NOT LIKE "%user id not%" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bank_account_flag, "" AS waiting_for_additional_doc_at, "" AS waiting_for_ops_at, "" AS completed_at, CASE WHEN acquisition_channel = "MSE"THEN 'MS Channel' WHEN acquisition_channel != "MSE" THEN "Others" END AS SubChannel, "PAID" AS payment_status, "Non OTS" AS ots_flag, "" bankcode, "" account_number, "" beneficiary_name, "Old Manual Data" order_platform -- FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.verifikasi_order_edc_bukuwarung` verifikasi FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.verifikasi_order_edc_bukuwarung_static` verifikasi LEFT JOIN `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnts_derived.ms_name_cleaning_version` clean_data ON TRIM(LOWER(verifikasi.mse_name)) = clean_data.agent_name WHERE uid_pembeli_bukuwarung IS NOT NULL AND product_selected IN ("Pembelian - EDC PAX A920 Pro", "Pembelian - EDC Saku") AND inv_status_number = "New Submission" AND payment_status_doku = "SUCCESS" AND action_1 IN ("Accept Order", "On Hold Order") AND uid_pembeli_bukuwarung ="82276211002" ) , verification_one_machine AS( SELECT * EXCEPT(unique_id, order_platform), CAST(no_order AS STRING) AS children_orderid, order_platform FROM verification_data WHERE unique_id = 1 ) , verification_multiple_machine AS( SELECT verification_data.* EXCEPT(unique_id), CAST(CONCAT(no_order, "00", CAST(offset AS STRING)) AS STRING) AS children_orderid, FROM verification_data CROSS JOIN UNNEST (GENERATE_ARRAY(1,unique_id)) AS offset WHERE unique_id != 1 ) , verification_data_final AS( SELECT * FROM verification_one_machine UNION ALL SELECT * FROM verification_multiple_machine ) ,ots_visit AS( SELECT * EXCEPT (rn) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN phoneNumber LIKE '62%' THEN SUBSTR(phoneNumber, 3) WHEN phoneNumber LIKE '0%' THEN SUBSTR(phoneNumber, 2) ELSE phoneNumber END phoneNumber, ots_serial_number, ots_order_id, visitDate, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ots_order_id) rn FROM `merchant_success_analytics.ms_visit_ssot` WHERE ots_order_id IS NOT NULL AND ots_order_id <> "" ) WHERE rn=1 ) ### EDC NEW OPS FLOW , new_ops_flow_data AS( SELECT * EXCEPT(rnk_) FROM( SELECT DISTINCT DATE(TIMESTAMP_ADD(CAST(payment_metadata.paymentlinkgeneratedtime AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR)) AS input_time_data, edc_order.order_id AS no_order, transaction_id as no_order_2, user_id AS bw_user_id, DATE(TIMESTAMP_ADD(CAST( REPLACE( REPLACE(payment_metadata.paidat, '{', ''), '}', '' ) AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR)) AS tanggal_order, prod.name AS nama_produk, 1 AS total_barang, CAST(payment_metadata.paymentamount AS STRING) AS harga_produk, edc_order.status AS order_status, edc_order.status AS final_action, CAST(DATE(TIMESTAMP_ADD(CAST(edc_order.updated_at AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR)) AS STRING) AS final_action_date, "" AS reject_reason, CASE WHEN partnership.sn_list IS NOT NULL THEN "Other Channels" WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE 'STF%' THEN "MSE-Big Agent" WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE 'TF0%' OR metadata.tfcode LIKE 'STF%' OR metadata.tfcode LIKE 'XTF%' THEN 'MSE' WHEN metadata.tfcode IS NULL THEN 'Other Channels' WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE "JTI%" THEN "MSE" WHEN metadata.tfcode NOT LIKE 'TF0%' THEN 'Other Channels' END as channel, "" AS mvt_checking, CASE WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE 'TF0%' OR metadata.tfcode LIKE 'STF%' THEN TRIM(LOWER(ms_data.name)) ELSE metadata.tfcode END AS agent_name, metadata.tfcode AS tfcode, -- CASE WHEN payment_metadata.paymentamount = 749000 THEN "Tianyu" -- WHEN payment_metadata.paymentamount = 3499000 THEN "Pax" -- END AS product_name_standardize, -- CASE WHEN payment_metadata.paymentamount = 2499000 THEN "Pax - Refurbished" -- ELSE prod.name -- END AS product_name_standardize, CASE -- WHEN payment_metadata.paymentamount = 15000 THEN "Android - Big Agent" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN") THEN "MoreFun" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE") THEN "MoreFun - Bundle" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_TIYANU") THEN "Tianyu" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_PAX") THEN "Pax" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_PAX_REFURBISHED") THEN "Pax - Refurbished" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_VERIFONE") THEN "Verifone" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_VERIFONE_REFURBISHED") THEN "Verifone - Refurbished" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE_INSURANCE") THEN "MoreFun - Bundle Insurance" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_INSURANCE") THEN "MoreFun - Insurance Only" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_ANDROID_MOREFUN_PREORDER","EDC_MOREFUN_ANDROID") THEN "MoreFun - Android" WHEN edc_plan.name IS NULL AND edc_order.metadata.tfcode = 'SHOPEE' THEN edc_order.metadata.devicemappingdetails. description END AS product_name_standardize, -- CASE WHEN prod.name IN ("Pax", "Verifone") THEN "EDC Android" -- WHEN prod.name IN ("Tianyu", "MoreFun") THEN "EDC Saku" -- WHEN payment_metadata.paymentamount = 2499000 THEN "EDC Android - Refurbished" -- END AS edc_type, -- CASE WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE 'STF%' THEN "Android - Big Agent" -- WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN","EDC_TIYANU","Saku") THEN "EDC Saku" -- WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("Android - New","EDC_PAX","EDC_VERIFONE","EDC_ANDROID_MOREFUN_PREORDER") THEN "EDC Android" -- WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_PAX_REFURBISHED","EDC_VERIFONE_REFURBISHED") THEN "EDC Android - Refurbished" -- WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE") THEN "EDC Saku - Bundle" -- WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_INSURANCE") THEN "EDC Saku - Insurance Only" -- WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE_INSURANCE") THEN "EDC Saku - with Insurance" -- END AS edc_type, CASE WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE 'STF%' THEN "Android - Big Agent" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN","EDC_TIYANU","Saku") THEN "Saku" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("Android - New","EDC_PAX","EDC_VERIFONE","EDC_ANDROID_MOREFUN_PREORDER","EDC_MOREFUN_ANDROID") or cart_plans.plan_id = '47afa1a2-d8ea-44ba-bac4-559a8c1fc005' THEN "Android - New" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_PAX_REFURBISHED","EDC_VERIFONE_REFURBISHED") THEN "Android - Refurbished" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE") THEN "Saku - Printer Bundle" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_BUNDLE_INSURANCE") THEN "Saku - Insurance Bundle" WHEN edc_plan.name IN ("EDC_MOREFUN_INSURANCE") THEN "Saku - Insurance Only" END AS edc_type, "EDC New Ops Flow" AS flag_sheet, CASE WHEN metadata.checks.kycdone IS TRUE and metadata.kycstatus <> 'INITIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS kyc_flag, CASE WHEN metadata.checks.kybdone IS TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS kyb_flag, CASE WHEN metadata.checks.bankaccountadded IS TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bank_account_flag, # EDGE CASE CASE WHEN TRIM( REPLACE(REPLACE(metadata.orderprogress.waiting_for_additional_doc, '{', ''), '}', '') ) = '2024-11-11T08:25' THEN CAST( DATE( TIMESTAMP_ADD( CAST( CONCAT( TRIM( REPLACE(REPLACE(metadata.orderprogress.waiting_for_additional_doc, '{', ''), '}', '') ), ':00' ) AS TIMESTAMP ), INTERVAL 7 HOUR ) ) AS STRING ) ELSE CAST( DATE( TIMESTAMP_ADD( CAST( TRIM( REPLACE(REPLACE(metadata.orderprogress.waiting_for_additional_doc, '{', ''), '}', '') ) AS TIMESTAMP ), INTERVAL 7 HOUR ) ) AS STRING ) END AS waiting_for_additional_doc_at, CASE -- When timestamp is missing seconds (format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM) WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(metadata.orderprogress.waiting_for_ops)) = 16 THEN CAST( DATE( TIMESTAMP_ADD( CAST(CONCAT(TRIM(metadata.orderprogress.waiting_for_ops), ':00') AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR ) ) AS STRING ) -- When timestamp already has seconds (format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS) ELSE CAST( DATE( TIMESTAMP_ADD( CAST(TRIM(metadata.orderprogress.waiting_for_ops) AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR ) ) AS STRING ) END AS waiting_for_ops_at, CAST(DATE(TIMESTAMP_ADD(CAST(metadata.orderprogress.completed AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR)) AS STRING) AS completed_at, CASE WHEN partnership.sn_list IS NOT NULL THEN "Partnership" WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE 'TF0%' OR metadata.tfcode LIKE 'STF%' OR metadata.tfcode LIKE 'XTF%' THEN 'MS Channel' WHEN metadata.tfcode = "TIKTOKLIVE" THEN "Live Streaming" WHEN metadata.tfcode IN ("TIKTOKBW","TITOKBW") THEN "Social Media" WHEN metadata.tfcode = "BEBASTAMBAHCUAN300" THEN "Social Media" WHEN metadata.tfcode IS NULL THEN 'Organic' WHEN metadata.tfcode LIKE "JTI%" THEN "MS Channel" WHEN metadata.devicemappingdetails. referral_code = 'SHOPEE' THEN "Shopee" WHEN metadata.tfcode NOT LIKE 'TF0%' AND metadata.tfcode NOT IN ("TITOKBW","TIKTOKBW","BEBASTAMBAHCUAN300","TIKTOKLIVE") AND codes.channel IS NOT NULL THEN codes.channel ELSE "Organic" END AS SubChannel, payment_status, CASE WHEN ots_order_id IS NOT NULL THEN "OTS" ELSE "Non OTS" END ots_flag, CAST(edc_order.order_id AS STRING) AS children_orderid, UPPER(edc_order.name) account_name, UPPER(bank_name), bank_account, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY edc_order.order_id, user_id ORDER BY cart_plans.updated_at DESC) AS rnk_, --avoid duplicate CASE WHEN UPPER(metadata.devicemappingdetails.type) = "WEB" THEN "Website" WHEN (metadata.devicemappingdetails. type = 'EZA' AND metadata.devicemappingdetails. referral_code = 'SHOPEE') THEN "Shopee" ELSE "Apps" END AS order_platform FROM `ledger-fcc1e.db_accounting.prod_edc_order` edc_order LEFT JOIN `ledger-fcc1e.merchant_success_analytics.tfcode_name` ms_data ON edc_order.metadata.tfcode = ms_data.sales_code LEFT JOIN `db_accounting.prod_cart` cart ON edc_order.order_id=cart.order_id LEFT JOIN `db_accounting.prod_cart_plans` cart_plans ON cart.id=cart_plans.cart_id LEFT JOIN `db_accounting.prod_edc_plans` edc_plan ON edc_plan.id=cart_plans.plan_id LEFT JOIN `db_accounting.prod_edc_products` prod ON prod.id=edc_plan.product_id LEFT JOIN `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.tfcode_otp_not_required` as codes ON metadata.tfcode = codes.tfcode LEFT JOIN ots_visit ON edc_order.transaction_id = ots_visit.ots_order_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT order_id, serial_number FROM `db_accounting.prod_edc_user_details` ) edc_user ON edc_user.order_id = cart.order_id LEFT JOIN `edc_partnership.partnership_ssot` partnership ON edc_user.serial_number = partnership.sn_list WHERE DATE(TIMESTAMP_ADD(CAST( REPLACE( REPLACE(payment_metadata.paidat, '{', ''), '}', '' ) AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL 7 HOUR)) >= "2024-08-13" AND (payment_status = "PAID" or payment_status = 'REFUNDED' or payment_status = "REFUNDING_FAILED") AND ((metadata.devicemappingdetails. type = 'EZA' AND metadata.devicemappingdetails. referral_code = 'SHOPEE') or metadata.devicemappingdetails.type is null OR metadata.devicemappingdetails.type !="EZA") AND metadata.clientname IS NULL ) WHERE rnk_ = 1 ) ## EZA DATA , eza_data AS( SELECT DATE(trx_date) as input_time_data, parent_order_id AS no_order, parent_order_id as no_order_2, CASE WHEN uid_activation IS NULL THEN uid_eza ELSE uid_activation END AS bw_user_id, DATE(trx_date) AS tanggal_order, CASE WHEN sn LIKE "%V9E%" THEN "Verifone" WHEN sn LIKE "%1851%" THEN "Pax" END AS nama_produk, 1 AS total_barang, "3300000" AS harga_produk, "Completed"AS order_status, "Completed"AS final_action, trx_date as final_action_date, "" AS reject_reason, "Other Channels" AS channel, "" AS mvt_checking, CONCAT(name," - EZA") AS agent_name, "" AS tfcode, CASE WHEN sn LIKE "%V9E%" THEN "Verifone" WHEN sn LIKE "%1851%" THEN "Pax" END AS product_name_standardize, CASE WHEN sn LIKE "%V9E%" THEN "Android - New" WHEN sn LIKE "%1851%" THEN "Android - New" END AS edc_type, "List EZA with Scheme" AS flag_sheet, 1 AS kyc_flag, 1 AS kyb_flag, 1 AS bank_account_flag, "" AS waiting_for_additional_doc_at, "" AS waiting_for_ops_at, "" AS completed_at, "Others" AS SubChannel, "PAID" AS payment_status, "Non OTS" AS ots_flag, CAST(child_order_id AS STRING)AS children_orderid, "" bankcode, "" account_number, "" beneficiary_name, "Old Manual Data" order_platform -- FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.list_eza_with_scheme` FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.list_eza_with_scheme_static` WHERE parent_order_id IS NOT NULL ) ## TIKTOK SHOP DATA , tiktokshop_data AS( SELECT DATE(order_date) AS input_time_data, parent_order_id AS no_order, parent_order_id as no_order_2, uid_registration AS bw_user_id, DATE(order_date) AS tanggal_order, product_name AS nama_produk, 1 AS total_barang, original_price AS harga_produk, CASE WHEN final_action = "Accept Order" THEN "Completed" END AS order_status, CASE WHEN final_action = "Accept Order" THEN "Completed" END AS final_action, action_date AS final_action_date, reject_hold_reason AS reject_reason, "Other Channels" AS channel, verification_status AS mvt_checking, "Tiktok Shop" AS agent_name, "Tiktok Shop" AS tfcode, CASE WHEN product_name LIKE "%EDC Saku%" OR product_name LIKE "%MoreFun%" THEN "MoreFun" WHEN product_name LIKE "%EDC Android%" OR product_name LIKE "%Verifone%" THEN "Verifone" END AS product_name_standardize, CASE WHEN product_name LIKE "%EDC Saku%" OR product_name LIKE "%MoreFun%" THEN "Saku" WHEN product_name LIKE "%EDC Android%" OR product_name LIKE "%Verifone%" THEN "Android - New" END AS edc_type, "Tiktokshop Order Data" AS flag_sheet, CASE WHEN verification_status = "Verified" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS kyc_flag, CASE WHEN verification_status = "Verified" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS kyb_flag, CASE WHEN verification_status = "Verified" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bank_account_flag, "" AS waiting_for_additional_doc_at, "" AS waiting_for_ops_at, "" AS completed_at, "TikTok Shop" AS SubChannel, "PAID" AS payment_status, "Non OTS" AS ots_flag, children_order_id AS children_orderid, "" bankcode, "" account_number, "" beneficiary_name, "Tiktok Shop" order_platform FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.tiktokshop_order_data` WHERE order_date >= "2024-10-01" AND original_price != "0" AND order_substatus NOT IN ("Refunded", "Canceled") ) # RENTAL TO PURCHASE , rental_to_purchase AS( SELECT DATE(paid_date) AS input_time_data, origin_order_id AS no_order, latest_invoice_number as no_order_2, bw_user_id, DATE(paid_date) AS tanggal_order, device AS nama_produk, 1 AS total_barang, CASE WHEN amount_paid3 IS NOT NULL THEN amount_paid3 WHEN amount_paid2 IS NOT NULL THEN amount_paid2 WHEN amount_paid1 IS NOT NULL THEN amount_paid1 END AS harga_produk, "Completed" AS order_status, "Completed"AS final_action, "" AS final_action_date, "" AS reject_reason, "MSE" channel, "" AS mvt_checking, mse_name AS agent_name, "" AS tfcode, CASE WHEN device LIKE "Pax" THEN "Pax" WHEN device LIKE "Veristore" THEN "Verifone" END AS product_name_standardize, CASE WHEN device LIKE "Pax" THEN "Android - New" WHEN device LIKE "Veristore" THEN "Android - New" END AS edc_type, "Master Sheet Rental" AS flag_sheet, 1 AS kyc_flag, 1 AS kyb_flag, 1 AS bank_account_flag, "" AS waiting_for_additional_doc_at, "" AS waiting_for_ops_at, "" AS completed_at, "MS Channel" AS SubChannel, "PAID" AS payment_status, "Non OTS" AS ots_flag, CAST(latest_invoice_number AS STRING) AS children_orderid, "" bankcode, "" account_number, "" beneficiary_name, "Old Manual Data" order_platform FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnt_temp.master_sheet_rental` WHERE collection_status IN ("Purchase the Device","Purchase the Device - Auto Ownership") ) , combine_data AS( SELECT * FROM order_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM verification_data_final UNION ALL SELECT * FROM new_ops_flow_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM eza_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM tiktokshop_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM rental_to_purchase ) , mse_name_from_ms_static AS ( SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(mse_name_updated) AS agent_name, 1 AS flag FROM `ledger-fcc1e.merchant_success_analytics.mapping_area_mse`) SELECT input_time_data order_date, tanggal_order payment_date, no_order order_id, no_order_2, children_orderid, combine_data.bw_user_id, nama_produk, product_name_standardize, edc_type, total_barang, harga_produk, order_status, final_action, final_action_date, reject_reason, channel, subchannel, tfcode, combine_data.agent_name, flag_sheet, mvt_checking, kyc_flag, kyb_flag, bank_account_flag, mse_name_from_ms_static.flag AS mse_flag, ots_flag, waiting_for_additional_doc_at, waiting_for_ops_at, completed_at, payment_status, bank_account_name, combine_data.bank_name, bank_account_number, order_platform, -- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BhibNbDor68toaQN5KE73KHxUGwuRknlxeIr-qhkpOc/edit?usp=sharing" AS gsheet_ssot_documentation, "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1mjYH4iYlHoAP6AjQWXD_dANndxzSO3rsrfb7c9SY_4o/edit?usp=sharing" AS gdocs_ssot_documentation, FROM combine_data LEFT JOIN mse_name_from_ms_static ON LOWER(combine_data.agent_name) = mse_name_from_ms_static.agent_name -- WHERE NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(product_name_standardize, '(?i)Insurance Only') -- LEFT JOIN `ledger-fcc1e.db_accounting.prod_edc_user_details` user ON combine_data.no_order = user.order_id -- WHERE user.order_id IS NOT NULL
